sections.title: This Act shall be administered by the Agency. Administration
sections.body:
of Act
The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section four Repeal and
replacement
and the substitution therefor of the following:
of section 4
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K1, 000
8 [ No. 2 of 2010 Trademarks (Amendment)
Seal 4. (1) The seal of the Agency kept in terms of the Patents
Act No 15 of and Companies Registration Agency Act, 2010, shall be used
2010 for the purposes of this Act and the impression thereof made
for such purposes shall be judicially noticed.
(2) On the commencement of this Act, any impression
of a seal made for the purposes of this Act before the
commencement of this Act shall be deemed to be an
impression of the seal of the Agency.
Repeal and 5. The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section five
replacement and the substitution therefor of the following new section:
of section 5
Registrar and 5. (1) The Registrar shall exercise the powers and perform
other staff the duties assigned to the Registrar by this Act and the Patents
and Companies Registration Agency Act, 2010.
Act No. 15 of
2010
(2) The Agency may appoint, on such terms and
conditions as it may determine, examiners and such other
staff as it considers necessary for the performance of its
functions under this Act.
Amendment Section eighty-one of the principal Act is amended in
of section 81 subsection (1) by the insertion immediately after the word "may"
of the words "on the recommendation of the Agency,".
The principal Act is amended by the deletion of the words
General
amendment of "Trade Marks Office" and "Patent Office" wherever they appear
Act and the substitution therefor of the word "Agency".
